# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    # Read input
    N = int(sys.stdin.readline())
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()

    # Single linear scan of the string
    for i in range(N - 1):
        if (S[i] == 'a' and S[i + 1] == 'b') or (S[i] == 'b' and S[i + 1] == 'a'):
            print("Yes")
            return
    print("No")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
